node.text: Audrey has four fur babies that are very important to her.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "personalities fur babies") on Observation 1 (Score: 1.00)

node.text: Audrey's childhood dog was named Max, who had lots of energy and loved playing fetch.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "personalities fur babies") on Observation 2 (Score: 1.00)

node.text: Audrey believes that pets listen without judging and provide unconditional love, bringing joy, comfort, and love to our lives.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "personalities fur babies") on Observation 4 (Score: 0.99)

node.text: Audrey considers her dogs part of her family and expresses gratitude for having them in her life.
